scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @cursor-blog/api" "npm run dev -w @cursor-blog/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cursor-blog/api && npm run build -w @cursor-blog/web
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run start -w @cursor-blog/api" "npm run start -w @cursor-blog/web"
